name: Mudslide Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour and baking powder.
2. Sift in the salt.
3. In a small saucepan, melt butter over low heat with chocolate until smooth.
4. Set aside to cool slightly.
5. In a large bowl, beat eggs.
6. Add sugar to the egg mixture.
7. Stir in the coffee liqueur.
8. Fold in the Irish Cream liqueur and vodka.
9. Combine the flour mixture with the wet ingredients.
10. Fold in chopped walnuts if using.
11. Pour batter into a greased 13x9-inch pan.
12. Bake at 350°F for about 25 minutes, or until set.
13. Cool completely in the pan.
14. Drizzle Kahlua glaze over the cooled brownies.
15. Decorate with whole coffee beans if desired.
16. Cut into squares and serve.
